g.title: timeline_restart
g.text: walshadow restart timelines — 3 scenarios, time flows top → bottom within each column

g.title: cluster_a
g.text: A. clean restart (SIGTERM, cursor flushed, slot inside wal_keep_size)

g.title: cluster_b
g.text: B. kill -9 mid-stream (last fsynced cursor authoritative)

g.title: cluster_c
g.text: C. extended outage (source recycled resume WAL)

g.title: b4
g.text: ⑤ shadow PG recovers on its own
